name: South Dade Home Chemical Collection Center
hours: Check the official Miami-Dade home chemical collection page for current hours and holiday schedules before visiting.
fees: Household hazardous waste drop-off is generally resident-focused. Confirm current eligibility and item limits before arrival.
rules: Use the county page to confirm accepted materials, packaging rules, and any proof-of-residency requirements before you drive.
not_accepted: Materials outside the posted household program
